command:
uv run python -u -c 
import urllib.request
import urllib.error

# Attempt deRosenroll 2026 PDF from Cell Press. Try multiple URLs.
urls = [
    'https://www.cell.com/cell-reports/pdf/S2211-1247(25)01605-5.pdf',
    'https://www.cell.com/action/showPdf?pii=S2211-1247%2825%2901605-5',
    'https://www.cell.com/cell-reports/pdfExtended/S2211-1247(25)01605-5',
    'https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2211124725016055/pdfft',
]
out = 'tasks/t0010_hunt_missed_dsgc_models/assets/paper/10.1016_j.celrep.2025.116833/files/derosenroll_2026_circuit-ei-microarchitecture.pdf'
for u in urls:
    req = urllib.request.Request(u, headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (neuron-channels-arf; mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)', 'Accept': 'application/pdf,*/*'})
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60) as resp:
            data = resp.read()
            ct = resp.headers.get('Content-Type', '')
            print(u, '->', len(data), ct)
            if 'pdf' in ct.lower() and len(data) > 50000:
                with open(out, 'wb') as f:
                    f.write(data)
                print('WROTE pdf:', out, len(data))
                break
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        print(u, 'HTTP', e.code, e.reason)
    except Exception as e:
        print(u, 'ERROR', repr(e))
